payload.query: Describe a recent theoretical development in the study of American politics. How does this theory replace or update prior theories? What central puzzles does it explain? What are its strengths and weaknesses? Discuss empirical research that has stemmed from it and promising unexplored lines of research.

articles.title: Read the Supreme Court Decision
articles.abstract: The Supreme Court ruled that the race-conscious admissions programs at Harvard and the University of North Carolina were unlawful, curtailing affirmative action at colleges and universities around the nation.
